mapper.sql: sp.cef_id, sp.claim_no, sp.chn_sn, sp.sply_chn_role_cd, sp.co_nm, sp.co_addr, sp.lc_addr, sp.recv_dt, sp.recv_mass, sp.blnd_ratio, sp.blnd_evid_file_id, sp.use_bgng_dt, sp.use_end_dt, sp.frst_reg_dt, sp.frst_reg_user_id, sp.last_chg_dt, sp.last_chg_user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO er.tn_cef_spchn (cef_id, claim_no, chn_sn, sply_chn_role_cd, co_nm, co_addr, lc_addr, recv_dt, recv_mass, blnd_ratio, blnd_evid_file_id, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{cefId}, #{claimNo}, #{chnSn}, #{splyChnRoleCd}, #{coNm}, #{coAddr}, #{lcAddr}, #{recvDt}, #{recvMass}, #{blndRatio}, #{blndEvidFileId}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE er.tn_cef_spchn SET sply_chn_role_cd = #{splyChnRoleCd}, co_nm = #{coNm}, co_addr = #{coAddr}, lc_addr = #{lcAddr}, recv_dt = #{recvDt}, recv_mass = #{recvMass}, blnd_ratio = #{blndRatio}, blnd_evid_file_id = #{blndEvidFileId}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE cef_id = #{cefId} AND claim_no = #{claimNo} AND chn_sn = #{chnSn} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
